label: Specific apparel requirement
description: A precise apparel slot requirement specifying which body part group, layer, def, tag, and quality the pawn must wear when generated.

apparelDef.label: Apparel def
apparelDef.description: Specific ThingDef the pawn must wear. When set, tag-based selection is skipped.

requiredTag.label: Required tag
requiredTag.description: Apparel tag the item must have. Used when apparelDef is not set.

alternateTagChoices.label: Alternate tag choices
alternateTagChoices.description: Additional apparel tags that can satisfy this requirement, each with their own selection weight.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: ThingDef material override for stuffed apparel.

styleDef.label: Style def
styleDef.description: ThingStyleDef applied to the apparel when generated.

color.label: Color
color.description: Color applied to the apparel. Format: (r, g, b, a).

colorGenerator.label: Color generator
colorGenerator.description: ColorGenerator used to randomly select the apparel color when color is not fixed.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Quality category override for the generated apparel.

locked.label: Locked
locked.description: If true, the pawn cannot remove or trade this apparel item.

biocode.label: Biocode
biocode.description: If true, the apparel is biocoded to the pawn at generation.

useRandomStyleDef.label: Use random style def
useRandomStyleDef.description: If true, a random style is selected for the apparel rather than using styleDef.

ignoreNaked.label: Ignore naked
ignoreNaked.description: If true, the naked check is skipped for this apparel slot.
